failure_reason: Added a reusable Python module parser entry above BMF source sensing. python-parse-module-file emits py-module and py-statement objects; python-parse-module-tree-file emits indentation-aware py-module-tree objects. The proof covers full-file sample parsing, parenthesized multiline continuation as one logical statement, and real def-body ownership in source and binary modes at 21500. Scanner coverage now includes Python 3.14 type, @=, and t-string source objects; a temporary 20-file real-repo proof passes in source and binary while larger arbitrary corpus runs expose remaining throughput work before whole-repo completion can be claimed.
